title: NotificationCategory
description: Registry entry seeded from every module's notifications.json. `tenant_id NULL` + is_system=true = platform default. `tenant_id` set = tenant override that only touches display_name + default_channels (never priority + consent_tier + opt_out_allowed — those are compliance concerns). SeedCategoriesCommand upserts on deploy; runtime writes only from tenant admin UI.

tenant_id.description: NULL = platform default; tenant_id set = tenant override.

owning_module.description: Module that registered this category (`invitations`, `auth`, `billing`, ...). Enforced by the seeder — tenant overrides inherit from the platform row.

display_name.description: Human-readable label rendered in the preferences UI. Tenant may override. Translated via `HasTranslations`.

description.description: Short description shown as help text in the preferences UI. Translated via `HasTranslations`.

default_channels.description: Array of channel slugs. The fallback when no user preference exists. Tenant may override.

priority.description: Enum: `critical`, `transactional`, `product`, `marketing`. NEVER overridden by tenants — platform default only (compliance concern).

consent_tier.description: Enum: `transactional_required` (Art. 6(1)(b) contract), `product_default` (Art. 6(1)(f) legitimate interest), `marketing_opt_in` (Art. 6(1)(a) consent), `marketing_double_opt_in` (Art. 6(1)(a) with confirmation).

opt_out_allowed.description: False for transactional_required (security alerts, receipts, invitations). True for everything else. NEVER overridden by tenants.

is_system.description: True for platform-owned rows. HasSystemFlag refuses edit for non-super_admin — tenant overrides use different rows.

sort_order.description: From Sortable. Ordering in the preferences UI.

translations.description: Per-locale content-translation blob. Shape: `{ locale_code: { field: value } }`. Managed by the `HasTranslations` trait (wraps `spatie/laravel-translatable`). Column added via `localization::Blueprint::translations()`.

indexes.name: notification_categories_tenant_slug_unique
indexes.description: One row per (tenant_id, slug) tuple. NULL tenant_id is a distinct key (platform default). The resolver looks up (tenant, slug) first, falls back to (NULL, slug).

indexes.name: notification_categories_priority_index
indexes.description: Compliance reporting query: 'how many marketing_opt_in categories does tenant X have?'

x-translatable.wire_convention: Active-locale projection onto the field name by default. Full JSONB blob under `data.translations` when the request carries `?include=translations`.
x-translatable.auto_translate: opt-in via TenantLocale.auto_translate=true per target locale

display_name.description: Active-locale projection. Full blob available via `?include=translations`.

description.description: Active-locale projection. Full blob available via `?include=translations`.

translations.description: Per-locale content translations. Wire-included only when `?include=translations`. Shape: `{ locale_code: { field: value } }`.
